detectors.description:
Reentrancy in VulnerableVault.withdraw() (contracts/task5/VulnerableVault.sol#20-32):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}() (contracts/task5/VulnerableVault.sol#27)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] = 0 (contracts/task5/VulnerableVault.sol#30)
	VulnerableVault.balances (contracts/task5/VulnerableVault.sol#8) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- VulnerableVault.balances (contracts/task5/VulnerableVault.sol#8)
	- VulnerableVault.deposit() (contracts/task5/VulnerableVault.sol#14-17)
	- VulnerableVault.withdraw() (contracts/task5/VulnerableVault.sol#20-32)
detectors.markdown:

	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [balances[msg.sender] = 0](contracts/task5/VulnerableVault.sol#L30)
	[VulnerableVault.balances](contracts/task5/VulnerableVault.sol#L8) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [VulnerableVault.balances](contracts/task5/VulnerableVault.sol#L8)
	- [VulnerableVault.deposit()](contracts/task5/VulnerableVault.sol#L14-L17)
	- [VulnerableVault.withdraw()](contracts/task5/VulnerableVault.sol#L20-L32)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Attacker.attack() (contracts/task5/Attacker.sol#21-26):
	External calls:
	- vault.deposit{value: msg.value}() (contracts/task5/Attacker.sol#23)
	- vault.withdraw() (contracts/task5/Attacker.sol#24)
	External calls sending eth:
	- vault.deposit{value: msg.value}() (contracts/task5/Attacker.sol#23)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- AttackExecuted(address(this).balance) (contracts/task5/Attacker.sol#25)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Attacker.attack()](contracts/task5/Attacker.sol#L21-L26):
	External calls:
	- [vault.deposit{value: msg.value}()](contracts/task5/Attacker.sol#L23)
	- [vault.withdraw()](contracts/task5/Attacker.sol#L24)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [vault.deposit{value: msg.value}()](contracts/task5/Attacker.sol#L23)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [AttackExecuted(address(this).balance)](contracts/task5/Attacker.sol#L25)
